summary: Completed testing of CLIP Calibration fixes. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Calibration tab renders correctly with thresholds, stats, distribution table, and delete buttons working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ POST /api/ai/calibration/log - lightweight logging endpoint works correctly (no file upload needed)
✓ DELETE /api/ai/calibration/{id} deletes samples by ID correctly
✓ DELETE /api/ai/calibration/{id} returns ok=false for non-existent samples
✓ GET /api/ai/calibration returns samples from calibration_log collection with _id field
✓ Thresholds correctly displayed: 85% alta, 50% media, <50% rejeicao
✓ Admin 'Calibracao CLIP' tab shows delete button for each sample
✓ Admin delete button removes sample and refreshes UI (notification 'Amostra deletada' shown)
✓ App.js logCalibrationSample() called from BOTH sendFeedbackCorrect() (Sim) and sendToModerationQueue() (Não)
✓ New calibration_log MongoDB collection used (separate from feedback collection)
seed_data_creation: Test samples created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CLIP calibration fixes validated. All features working: POST /api/ai/calibration/log (lightweight logging), DELETE /api/ai/calibration/{id}, GET /api/ai/calibration with _id field. Both Sim and Não buttons in App.js call logCalibrationSample(). Admin Calibracao tab shows delete buttons that work correctly.

POST /api/ai/calibration/log (is_correct.details: Registers correct samples with dish_clip, dish_real, score, confidence, source

DELETE /api/ai/calibration/{id}.details: Deletes samples by ID, returns ok=false for non-existent/invalid IDs

GET /api/ai/calibration.details: Returns samples from calibration_log collection with _id field for deletion

Admin Calibracao tab delete buttons.details: Delete buttons visible for each sample, clicking removes sample and shows notification

App.js logCalibrationSample integration.details: Called from both sendFeedbackCorrect() (Sim button) and sendToModerationQueue() (Não button)

api_verification.POST /api/ai/calibration/log: PASS - Lightweight logging without file upload
api_verification.GET /api/ai/calibration: PASS - Returns samples with _id, stats, distribution, current_thresholds
